title: Automatically create several boards in newly created Workspace
excerpt: upon creating a new workspace, need to have several template boards added with workspace name in the board name.  don’t see a trigger for ‘create new workspace’.  Is there a workaround?   or even Possible?

posts.author: cstocksd (c stocksd)
posts.cookedHtml: upon creating a new workspace, need to have several template boards added with workspace name in the board name. don’t see a trigger for ‘create new workspace’. Is there a workaround? or even Possible?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @cstocksd,

I am afraid this automation isn’t natively supported - I apologise for the setback

I recommend checking out our developers community incase this is something that can be accomplished through our API. You can check it out (and post a question) here → monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum
